faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to the most common questions
faq.a1: EPS (Expanded Polystyrene) insulation is an advanced thermal insulation system for exterior facades. It provides excellent protection against heat and moisture, improves building energy efficiency, and gives facades an excellent aesthetic appearance.
faq.a2: Execution time varies based on project size and complexity. Small residential projects may take 2 weeks to 1 month, while larger projects may take several months. We provide a detailed timeline before work begins.
faq.a3: We serve all governorates of Iraq. We have completed projects in Duhok, Erbil, Sulaymaniyah, Nineveh, Baghdad, Basra, and other governorates.
faq.q4: Can I request a custom design?
faq.a4: Yes, all our designs are customized according to client needs and project nature. We provide 3D designs before execution to ensure your complete satisfaction with the design before work begins.
faq.a5: Yes, we offer free consultation for all clients. You can contact us via phone, WhatsApp, or fill out the consultation request form, and our team will contact you as soon as possible.
